paragraphs.text: Bodyweight fitness very much aligns with the spirit of minimalism that I aspire to embody in my life. I want to be strong and skillful in moving my body. To keep things simple, I bucket skills and attributes I want to work on into two categories: **mobility** and **strength**.

These are fitness principles I’ve found enlightening when considering how to structure my exercise regimen. My favorite sources for free, high-quality fitness information are the [Tom Merrick](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCU0DZhN-8KFLYO6beSaYljg) and [Redefining Strength](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCh2w-xqEwSz96sbn2afbOVQ) channels on YouTube. I’ve also gotten a lot out of the paid programs offered by [GMB Fitness](https://gmb.io/).
